<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\TimeSeries; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/ts.revrange/ * * Query a range in reverse direction. */ class TSREVRANGE extends TSRANGE { public function getId() { return 'TS.REVRANGE'; } }
